docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-29-2013 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-19-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT.
